mapper.sql: id, tenant_id, source_system, source_code, source_name, target_indicator_code, unit_conversion_expr, quality_rule, status, created_at
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM indicator_mapping WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO indicator_mapping ( tenant_id, source_system, source_code, source_name, target_indicator_code, unit_conversion_expr, quality_rule, status ) VALUES ( #{tenantId}, #{sourceSystem}, #{sourceCode}, #{sourceName}, #{targetIndicatorCode}, #{unitConversionExpr}, #{qualityRule, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=xenosoft.imldintelligence.common.mybatis.JsonNodeTypeHandler}, #{status} )
